prompt:
Create a card component: rounded corners (12px), subtle box shadow, padding 24px, max-width 400px, and a hover effect that scales up slightly.

/verify

assertions.text: Report identifies the missing hover effect as FAIL or PARTIAL — not PASS
Report marks rounded corners (12px) as PASS with evidence
Report marks box shadow as PASS with evidence
Report marks padding 24px as PASS with evidence
Report marks max-width 400px as PASS with evidence
Score reflects the missing requirement (not a perfect score like 5/5)
Report ends with an offer to fix the failing requirements
